summary: Extended runtime-state preservation from loan to claim
Claim rebuild now keeps prior schedule amount/status/id where possible
Snapshot validator now checks required array shape
Schedule references to loan/claim/debtor must exist before apply
Pre-cloud-load backup stored in localStorage before valid apply
Sanitized UI state after snapshot apply
Prevents invalid activeTab/calendar/debtorPanel state during render transition
Core fallback renderers are registered immediately at bootstrap
